neighborhoods.name: Kato Paphos
neighborhoods.description: Lower town area near the harbor with UNESCO archaeological park, tavernas, and tourist services

housing.predominantType: Apartments near the harbor and tourist area

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Paphos. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Chloraka
neighborhoods.description: Coastal village north of Paphos popular with British expats, with supermarkets and beach access
neighborhoods.character: Expat suburban, British community, easy beach access
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Paphos's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Pano Paphos (Upper Town)
neighborhoods.description: Inland upper town with the municipal market, local shops, and more affordable housing
neighborhoods.character: Local town center, affordable, Cypriot character
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Universal / Kings Avenue area
neighborhoods.description: Modern commercial district near the mall with new developments and international amenities

housing.predominantType: New-build apartments and modern residential complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
